objects.name: API Calls
objects.description: API calls utilized by an application that could indicate malicious activity

x_mitre_log_sources.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_sources.channel: Repeated sandbox or policy violations by a single process or app bundle (for example, deny rules) followed by successful access to resources or APIs that normally require higher privileges

x_mitre_log_sources.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_sources.channel: mmap with PROT_EXEC and PROT_WRITE by sandboxed app

x_mitre_log_sources.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_sources.channel: SELinux AVC related to execute_no_trans/execmem after decode/unpack activity by the same app UID
